summary: Comprehensive testing of new PMS folio/reservation flows completed. Backend (17/17 tests) and Frontend UI verification passed. All requested features are implemented: Check-in/Check-out buttons, Folyolar tab buttons (Acenteye Aktar, Mahsuplastir), Room Service charges, Split charge functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper conditional rendering for Giris Yap/Cikis Yap based on booking status
All new buttons have appropriate data-testid attributes for testing
Idempotency keys are properly generated for check-in/check-out operations
API calls use proper error handling with toast notifications
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed cari accounts and charges during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full PMS workflow tested. Key booking for testing: dc36f089-75bc-4d83-a94f-7d0558abb88d (Room 123, Suite, status=confirmed). Cari accounts: ABC Turizm (company), Star Travel Agency (agency). Calendar is at /app/reservation-calendar. Double-click booking bar to open ReservationDetailModal.
